_meta.source: Converted from the spire-codex live API (https://spire-codex.com, https://github.com/ptrlrd/spire-codex) via convert_from_spire_codex.py on 2026-07-10, filtered to color=='ironclad'. spire-codex's data is reverse-engineered from Slay the Spire 2's own decompiled game files (GDRE Tools PCK extraction + ILSpy decompilation of sts2.dll), not hand-transcribed from gameplay.
_meta.license: PolyForm Noncommercial License 1.0.0. Required Notice: Copyright (C) 2025-present Peter Lord and Spire Codex contributors. https://polyformproject.org/licenses/noncommercial/1.0.0 -- this data (and any model trained on it) is NONCOMMERCIAL USE ONLY.
_meta.scope_limitation: As of Stage 2 (2026-07-10), includes a data-driven triggered-Power system (turn-start / on-exhaust / on-HP-lost-this-turn / on-block-gained / on-Vulnerable-applied hooks) covering 14 Power-type cards and a generic `conditional` if/then/else wrapper covering 'this turn' condition cards. Still excludes: recursive auto-play (Stampede/Havoc/Hellraiser/Howl from Beyond), dynamic card costs (Corruption/Stomp), card-instance-persistent damage scaling (Rampage), 'next card played' pending modifiers (One Two Punch/Unrelenting/Rage), card-spawning effects, RandomEnemy/AnyAlly targeting, X-cost cards, and any card whose description implies a mechanic beyond the above (verified via both a complex-mechanic text-pattern denylist and a systematic unconsumed-numeric-var check -- see convert_from_spire_codex.py). See the 'excluded' list in _conversion_report_<color>.json for every excluded card and why.

effect_schema.damage: Deal `amount` damage to the target, `hits` times (default 1).
effect_schema.damage_all: Deal `amount` damage to every enemy, `hits` times (default 1).
effect_schema.damage_equals_block: Deal damage to target equal to the player's current block.
effect_schema.damage_double_if_target_vulnerable: Deal `amount` damage; if target has Vulnerable, deal it again (two separate hits).
effect_schema.damage_scales_with_tag: Deal `base` + `per_tag` * (count of cards in the player's whole deck whose name contains `tag`) damage.
effect_schema.apply_vulnerable: Apply `amount` stacks of Vulnerable to the target.
effect_schema.apply_vulnerable_all: Apply `amount` stacks of Vulnerable to every enemy.
effect_schema.apply_weak: Apply `amount` stacks of Weak to the target.
effect_schema.gain_strength: Gain `amount` Strength permanently (for the rest of combat).
effect_schema.gain_strength_this_turn: Gain `amount` Strength for the remainder of the current turn only.
effect_schema.exhaust_random_from_hand: Exhaust one random other card from hand.
effect_schema.upgrade_random_card_in_hand: Upgrade one random not-yet-upgraded card in hand for the rest of combat.
effect_schema.move_card_discard_to_draw_top: Move one random card from the discard pile to the top of the draw pile.
effect_schema.gain_power: Grant a persistent Power (`power_id`) for the rest of combat, with an optional `triggers` dict (event name -> effects list, or "magnitude" -> int for continuously-checked powers like Cruelty).
effect_schema.conditional: If `if` (a named this-turn/this-combat condition) is true, apply the `then` effects list, else the optional `else` list.
effect_schema.damage_random_enemy: Deal `amount` damage to one random living enemy.
effect_schema.enemy_lose_strength_this_turn: Reduce the target enemy's effective Strength by `amount` until its next turn resolves.
effect_schema.double_target_vulnerable: Double the target's current Vulnerable stacks.
effect_schema.set_no_draw_this_turn: Block any further `draw`/`draw_until_non_attack` effects for the rest of this turn.
effect_schema.return_random_attack_from_discard_upgrad: Move one random Attack from the discard pile into hand, upgraded.
effect_schema.exhaust_hand_and_damage: Exhaust the rest of the hand, then deal `per_card` damage to target for each card exhausted this way.
effect_schema.exhaust_hand_filtered_and_block: Exhaust hand cards matching `filter` (currently only "non_attack"), then gain `per_card` block for each.
effect_schema.exhaust_random_attack_and_add_damage: Exhaust one random other Attack from hand and add its own base damage to this card's `base` damage, dealt `hits` times.
effect_schema.draw_until_non_attack: Draw one card at a time until a non-Attack card is drawn (or hand/piles are exhausted).

cards.name: Aggression
